description: Rice blast is caused by the fungus Magnaporthe oryzae. It is one of the most destructive diseases of rice worldwide. Lesions appear as spindle-shaped spots with grey or white centers and brown borders on leaves, nodes, and panicles.
symptoms: Diamond-shaped lesions with grey centers on leaves
Brown to reddish-brown borders around lesions
Lesions on neck and panicle causing 'neck rot'
White or empty grains in severe cases
treatmentHi: ट्राइसाइक्लाज़ोल 75 WP @ 0.6 ग्राम/लीटर पानी का छिड़काव करें
आइसोप्रोथिओलेन 40 EC @ 1.5 मि.ली./लीटर पानी का प्रयोग करें
अत्यधिक नाइट्रोजन उर्वरक से बचें
उचित खेत जल निकासी बनाए रखें
preventionTip: Use blast-resistant varieties like IR 64, Swarna, or Pusa 44.

description: Bacterial leaf blight is caused by the bacterium Xanthomonas oryzae. It is a major disease in tropical and subtropical rice-growing regions, especially during warm, humid weather with heavy rains.
symptoms: Water-soaked to yellowish stripes on leaf margins
Lesions turn yellow to white, then grey
Wilting and drying of seedlings (kresek phase)
Bacterial ooze visible on cut leaf margin
treatment: Spray Copper Oxychloride 50 WP @ 3 g/L water
Remove and destroy infected plant material
Avoid flood irrigation that spreads the bacteria
treatmentHi: कॉपर ऑक्सीक्लोराइड 50 WP @ 3 ग्राम/लीटर पानी का छिड़काव करें
स्ट्रेप्टोमाइसिन सल्फेट + टेट्रासाइक्लिन @ 0.5 ग्राम/लीटर लगाएं
संक्रमित पौधों को हटाएं और नष्ट करें
बाढ़ सिंचाई से बचें जो बैक्टीरिया फैलाती है
preventionTip: Use certified disease-free seeds and resistant varieties like Pusa Basmati 1509.

description: Rice tungro disease is caused by a complex of two viruses (RTSV and RTBV) transmitted by the green leafhopper. It is prevalent in South and Southeast Asia.
symptoms: Yellow-orange discoloration starting from leaf tip
Stunted plant growth
Reduced tillering
Partial sterility of panicles
treatment: Control green leafhopper vector with Imidacloprid 17.8 SL @ 0.3 mL/L
Avoid ratoon cropping in infected fields
treatmentHi: इमिडाक्लोप्रिड 17.8 SL @ 0.3 मि.ली./लीटर से हरे फुदके को नियंत्रित करें
संक्रमित पौधों को उखाड़ें और नष्ट करें
संक्रमित खेतों में रैटून खेती से बचें
नर्सरी में कार्बोफ्युरान 3G दाने डालें
preventionTip: Synchronize planting dates with neighbors to break the disease cycle.

description: Sheath blight, caused by Rhizoctonia solani, is a major soil-borne fungal disease of rice. It thrives under high humidity, warm temperatures, and dense plant populations.
symptoms: Oval or irregular lesions on leaf sheaths near waterline
Lesions with white or grey centers and brown borders
Lesions extend to leaves and upper plant parts
Lodging of heavily infected plants
treatment: Reduce plant density by wider spacing
treatmentHi: हेक्साकोनाज़ोल 5 EC @ 2 मि.ली./लीटर पानी का छिड़काव करें
वेलिडामाइसिन 3L @ 2 मि.ली./लीटर पानी लगाएं
चौड़े अंतर से रोपाई करके पौध घनत्व कम करें
अत्यधिक नाइट्रोजन प्रयोग से बचें
preventionTip: Collect and destroy sclerotia floating in irrigation water using a fine mesh net.

description: Brown spot disease is caused by the fungus Helminthosporium oryzae. It is often associated with nutrient-deficient soils, particularly potassium and silicon deficiency.
symptoms: Circular to oval brown spots on leaves
Spots with a yellow halo around brown centers
Discoloration on leaf sheaths and grains
Premature drying of severely affected leaves
treatment: Apply potassium fertilizer to correct deficiency
Seed treatment with Thiram @ 3 g/kg seed
treatmentHi: मैनकोजेब 75 WP @ 2 ग्राम/लीटर पानी का छिड़काव करें
आईप्रोबेनफोस (IBP) 48 EC @ 1.5 मि.ली./लीटर पानी लगाएं
कमी को ठीक करने के लिए पोटेशियम उर्वरक लगाएं
थाइरम @ 3 ग्राम/किलो बीज से बीज उपचार करें
preventionTip: Apply silicon-rich amendments (rice husk ash or slag) to improve plant resistance.
